mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MEMBER (USER_NO, USER_ID, USER_PWD, NAME, ROLE, PHONE, EMAIL, BIRTH, ADDRESS, SEARCH_ME, GENDER, MINIMI, CREATE_DATE, ACORN, STATUS ) VALUES( (SELECT NEXTVAL('INSERT_SEQ') FROM DUAL), #{id}, #{password}, #{name}, DEFAULT, #{phone}, #{email}, #{birth}, #{address}, DEFAULT, #{gender}, #{minimi}, DEFAULT, DEFAULT, DEFAULT )
INSERT INTO MEMBER ( USER_NO, USER_ID, USER_PWD, NAME ) VALUES ( (SELECT NEXTVAL('INSERT_SEQ') FROM DUAL), #{id}, #{password}, #{name} )
INSERT INTO MINIHOME ( MINIHOME_NO , USER_NO , PROFILE , THEME , MH_ACCESS ) VALUES( (SELECT NEXTVAL('MINIHOME_SEQ') FROM DUAL), #{no}, #{profile}, DEFAULT, DEFAULT )
